subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses and manifested the clear proofs in such wise that they who dwell in the heavens are powerless to reckon them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات علی شان عجز عن احصائهما من فی السموات
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
